chunks.text: Prospective M.Eng. Student Projects and Courses by Area - EECS at Berkeley Prospective M.Eng. Student Projects and Courses by Area The EECS department offers concentrations in both Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. These are the requirements for each area. It is important to note that choosing one of these areas does not prevent you from taking courses in other areas. < Prospective: Computer Systems Prospective: Data Science > Prospective M.Eng. Student Projects and Courses by Area Prospective: Data Science Prospective: Physical Electronics and Integrated Circuits Prospective: Robotics and Embedded Software Prospective: Signal Processing and Communications Prospective: Visual Computing and Computer Graphics Prospective: Computer Systems View Open Faculty Positions
